reference: The evaluation workspace contains rtl/mctp_rx_context_tracker.sv, four testbenches under tb/, and a Makefile. The tracker contract is: an accepted start on an inactive context publishes expected_seq=seq_i+1 modulo SEQ_W; an in-order continuation is accepted and advances expected_seq; an out-of-order continuation emits a one-cycle seq_error and immediately clears active; explicit abort has priority over every simultaneous input and clears active without accept or seq_error; start is ignored while active; after exactly TIMEOUT_CYCLES consecutive active cycles without an accepted continuation or abort, timeout_abort pulses for one cycle and active clears. Reset clears all state and event pulses. The implementation must remain parameterized for SEQ_W and TIMEOUT_CYCLES. Do not change tests or the Makefile. Change only rtl/mctp_rx_context_tracker.sv.

cases.instruction: Inspect the RTL, repair start sequencing and sequence-error cleanup, and run make test_basic. Do not report success unless it passes. Return result=pass and check=basic_sequence.
Implement the exact idle timeout contract without breaking the basic sequence behavior. Run make test_basic and make test_timeout. Return result=pass and check=timeout.
Enforce abort priority and the active-context start rule, preserving prior fixes. Run make test_precedence. Return result=pass and check=precedence.
Audit the parameter arithmetic and sequence wrap behavior, make any necessary RTL-only correction, and run the full make test regression. Return result=pass and check=full_regression.
